subtopic: Evaluation of the Infertile Woman with Ovarian Reserve Testing
question: A 28-year-old woman with Hashimoto disease asks about egg freezing. Which course of action is best?
options: <Option A> Suggest she stop oral contraceptive pill and attempt conception
<Option C> Refer to reproductive endocrinology for egg freezing
<Option D> Reassure her that given her young age, future fertility will not be a problem
explanation: The patient is concerned about future fertility and asks about egg freezing. While she may have anovulatory cycles due to Hashimoto disease, the best course of action is to measure serum AMH first as it can help determine ovarian reserve.
reference: MAIN CONCLUSIONS: The elements of the management of the infertile couple are the following: Importance of evaluation of the couple. Primacy of the evaluation and management of the woman.
title: Antimullerian Hormone and Ovarian Reserve Testing
